THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANCHESTER, VERLANNIA MONIQUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMPSON, JOHN $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,360.00, THE COURT ORDERS RESCESSION OF THE SUBJECT CONTRACT.
